examples: She saw his blurry figure in the headlight, walking around the front of the car.
Such seemingly straightforward distinctions become blurry through numberless eyes.
It's kind of bleak, but you can really see those broad brushstrokes and the blurry lines.
As the train climbed higher, their profiles gradually faded into blurry silhouettes on the landscape.
Particularly in the case of a newly widowed parent, the lines can be blurry.
